description_long: This potted plant features lush, palmate green leaves radiating from multiple stems, creating a dense and bushy appearance. Rising above the foliage are several tall, upright flower spikes adorned with tightly clustered, vibrant purple blossoms, characteristic of the Lupinus genus. The leaves are deeply lobed and arranged in a circular pattern, giving the plant a full and symmetrical look from all angles. The flowers are conical and taper to a point, with a gradient of purple hues that become lighter toward the tips. The plant appears healthy and robust, with no visible signs of damage or disease. There is no visible pot or container in the images, suggesting the focus is on the plant itself rather than its receptacle.
description: A dense, leafy plant with palmate green leaves and tall spikes of vibrant purple flowers, resembling a healthy Lupinus. The foliage forms a lush base, while the flower spikes rise prominently above.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the plant from above, highlighting the radial symmetry of the leaves and the central cluster of purple flower spikes.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the plant from a slightly rotated angle, revealing more of the leaf layering and the staggered heights of the flower spikes.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a top-down perspective, emphasizing the even distribution of leaves and the upright arrangement of the flower spikes.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the plant from another side, showing the density of the foliage and the varied orientation of the flower spikes.
